title: Horror PVP
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/M9oT8kkfsf0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>This texture pack changes the majority of PvP items to a gray and depressing style, including textures for lava, minecarts, totems, and much more!

You can also find other compatible resource packs that I recommend to use in my YouTube video

Credits: 
Inspired by Matralys 16x, Black TNT by 2iperr
